title: Tangy Mexican Fish Grill
description: A peppery, glassy-jelly grilled fish dish served on an agave leaf, featuring fresh mozzarella balls and zesty lime sauce.
instructions: Preheat a grill to medium-high heat.
Season tilapia fillets with sea salt, black pepper, and a drizzle of olive oil.
Place the agave leaf on the grill to warm slightly, then lay the fish on top of the leaf.
Grill the fillets 4 minutes per side until the flesh is opaque and juices run clear.
While the fish is grilling, whisk lime juice, cilantro, minced jalapeño, garlic, and the remaining olive oil in a bowl.
Toss the mozzarella balls in the lime mixture until they are lightly coated.
Once the fish is done, remove it from the grill and let it rest for 2 minutes.
Serve the grilled fish on a plate and top it with the lime-coated mozzarella balls.
Drizzle any remaining lime sauce over the dish and garnish with extra cilantro.
Serve immediately while the fish is still warm.
